question: Main.md says high-output V50D calibrations require battery coolant flow above 15 L/min. What is the highest-power V50D calibration, and how many battery packs exceed 15 L/min? Include the max-coolant pack.
answer: High-output rule used: engine_family = V50D and battery coolant threshold coolant_flow_l_min > 15 L/min. Highest-power V50D calibration is calibration_id CAL-00017 on platform_code PX63 with peak_power_kw 1137.9. Battery packs exceeding coolant_flow_l_min > 15: 618. Max-coolant pack among those is pack_id BAT-00026, chemistry NMC811, coolant_flow_l_min 24.0, capacity_kwh 279.69, peak_discharge_kw 2061.4.

trace.raw: {"cli":"{MCD_CLI} query --format json {MCD_PATH} \"with v50d_power as (select calibration_id, platform_code, engine_family, peak_power_kw from powertrain_calibration_specs where lower(engine_family)=lower('V50D')), top_cal as (select calibration_id, platform_code, engine_family, peak_power_kw from v50d_power order by cast(peak_power_kw as real) desc, calibration_id asc limit 1), coolant_packs as (select pack_id, chemistry, coolant_flow_l_min, capacity_kwh, peak_discharge_kw from battery_pack_module_specs where cast(coolant_flow_l_min as real) > 15), top_pack as (select pack_id, chemistry, coolant_flow_l_min, capacity_kwh, peak_discharge_kw from coolant_packs order by cast(coolant_flow_l_min as real) desc, pack_id asc limit 1) select (select calibration_id from top_cal) as calibration_id, (select platform_code from top_cal) as platform_code, (select engine_family from top_cal) as engine_family, (select peak_power_kw from top_cal) as peak_power_kw, (select count(*) from coolant_packs) as battery_pack_count_exceeding_15_l_min, (select pack_id from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_id, (select chemistry from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_chemistry, (select coolant_flow_l_min from top_pack) as max_coolant_flow_l_min, (select capacity_kwh from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_capacity_kwh, (select peak_discharge_kw from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_peak_discharge_kw\""}

action.cli: {MCD_CLI} query --format json {MCD_PATH} "with v50d_power as (select calibration_id, platform_code, engine_family, peak_power_kw from powertrain_calibration_specs where lower(engine_family)=lower('V50D')), top_cal as (select calibration_id, platform_code, engine_family, peak_power_kw from v50d_power order by cast(peak_power_kw as real) desc, calibration_id asc limit 1), coolant_packs as (select pack_id, chemistry, coolant_flow_l_min, capacity_kwh, peak_discharge_kw from battery_pack_module_specs where cast(coolant_flow_l_min as real) > 15), top_pack as (select pack_id, chemistry, coolant_flow_l_min, capacity_kwh, peak_discharge_kw from coolant_packs order by cast(coolant_flow_l_min as real) desc, pack_id asc limit 1) select (select calibration_id from top_cal) as calibration_id, (select platform_code from top_cal) as platform_code, (select engine_family from top_cal) as engine_family, (select peak_power_kw from top_cal) as peak_power_kw, (select count(*) from coolant_packs) as battery_pack_count_exceeding_15_l_min, (select pack_id from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_id, (select chemistry from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_chemistry, (select coolant_flow_l_min from top_pack) as max_coolant_flow_l_min, (select capacity_kwh from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_capacity_kwh, (select peak_discharge_kw from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_peak_discharge_kw"

observation.command: {MCD_CLI} query --format json {MCD_PATH} "with v50d_power as (select calibration_id, platform_code, engine_family, peak_power_kw from powertrain_calibration_specs where lower(engine_family)=lower('V50D')), top_cal as (select calibration_id, platform_code, engine_family, peak_power_kw from v50d_power order by cast(peak_power_kw as real) desc, calibration_id asc limit 1), coolant_packs as (select pack_id, chemistry, coolant_flow_l_min, capacity_kwh, peak_discharge_kw from battery_pack_module_specs where cast(coolant_flow_l_min as real) > 15), top_pack as (select pack_id, chemistry, coolant_flow_l_min, capacity_kwh, peak_discharge_kw from coolant_packs order by cast(coolant_flow_l_min as real) desc, pack_id asc limit 1) select (select calibration_id from top_cal) as calibration_id, (select platform_code from top_cal) as platform_code, (select engine_family from top_cal) as engine_family, (select peak_power_kw from top_cal) as peak_power_kw, (select count(*) from coolant_packs) as battery_pack_count_exceeding_15_l_min, (select pack_id from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_id, (select chemistry from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_chemistry, (select coolant_flow_l_min from top_pack) as max_coolant_flow_l_min, (select capacity_kwh from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_capacity_kwh, (select peak_discharge_kw from top_pack) as max_coolant_pack_peak_discharge_kw"
